title: Build a reusable table component with slots and <.link> actions
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/components/table.ex (module MyAppWeb.Components.Table). Declare table/1 with attr :rows (list, required), attr :row_id (any, default nil), attr :row_click (any, default nil), and slot :col (required, takes attr :label). Additionally, slot :action (takes attr :label). Render <table> with <thead> showing @col.label and <tbody> iterating @rows, each row rendering each :col slot and a trailing :action column. The <tr> must include phx-click binding if @row_click is set.
tier_rationale: Multi-slot component with slot attrs. Complex composition pattern.
